title: Expecting all properties to be returned when creating a VIDEO
gherkin:
When the user creates a "VIDEO" "P1 vs F40" with the following data
  | key            | value       | datatype |
  | video_provider | youtube     | string   |
  | external_id    | NqsBncRslsg | string   |
Then the response should contain the following keys
  | key              |
  | video_provider   |
  | external_id      |
  | title            |
  | description      |
  | creator          |
  | license          |
  | tags             |
  | source           |
  | duration         |
  | thumbnail_url_l  |
  | thumbnail_url_m  |
  | thumbnail_url_s  |
  | thumbnail_url_xs |
